working_on.task: Completed — all issues resolved and docs saved
working_on.notes: Fixed 3 QC issues: (1) Data leakage between accounts via Riverpod reactive rebuild, (2) Guest delete wiping app settings → selective key removal, (3) Re-login with same Google after delete → crash 'no profile' fixed by clearing onboarding_completed flag and invalidating hasCompletedOnboardingProvider. Also audited all SharedPreferences keys and added _clearAllUserData() helper.

pending_tasks.task: QC manual test: Data isolation scenarios
Implement Phase 1 data sync upgrade (Bulk Insert & Transaction RPC)

recent_changes.description: Audit all SharedPreferences keys; add _clearAllUserData() helper; fix game + coach cache cleanup on account deletion (both Guest and Online paths)
Fix 'Chua co profile' crash after re-login with same Google email post delete-account by clearing onboarding_completed flag and invalidating hasCompletedOnboardingProvider
Fix data leakage between accounts: all keepAlive Riverpod Notifiers now watch their repository provider in build() to trigger reactive rebuild on user change
Fix guest session override bug in AuthRepositoryImpl on startup and save user locally to SharedPreferences

errors_encountered.error: Circular dependency khi import hasCompletedOnboardingProvider vào auth_provider.dart
errors_encountered.solution: Thực hiện ref.invalidate() ở UI layer (settings_page.dart) thay vì trong AuthNotifier. Tránh circular import giữa auth và profile providers.

errors_encountered.error: Supabase stream null overrides Guest user state
errors_encountered.solution: Check local guest user fallback inside AuthRepositoryImpl onAuthStateChange stream before emitting null.

decisions_made.reason: Tránh rải rác prefs.remove() calls ở nhiều nơi, dễ miss khi thêm key mới. Single responsibility, dễ audit.

decisions_made.decision: Invalidate hasCompletedOnboardingProvider ở UI layer (settings_page), không phải AuthNotifier
decisions_made.reason: Tránh circular dependency. AuthNotifier không nên import từ profile feature.

decisions_made.decision: Preserve app-wide settings (ai_provider, ai_api_key, sfx_muted, has_seen_welcome) khi xóa account
decisions_made.reason: User cài AI key một lần, không nên mất khi đổi account. Sound và welcome settings là app preferences, không phải user data.
Avoid occupying vertical screen space on Goal Scenario details by hiding full AI card in a slide-up bottom sheet triggered by a draggable floating button.
Cache AI advice locally under goalId+date key to reduce Gemini API costs by 90% and prevent excessive calls during scenario parameter adjustments.
